title: Office Romance review - Jennifer Lopez’s romcom return is too much like hard work
description: Star makes for reliably charming lead in Netflix’s basic throwback, but co-star Brett Goldstein, and his co-written script, lack in fizz
content: Netflix has become something of a safe space for Jennifer Lopez, a one-time box office heavyweight who has now secured a more reliable at-home following on the platform. Middling action films The Mother and Atlas might have turned critics off but bot... [4975 chars]

title: US plans to fight flesh-eating screwworm outbreak with flies and dogs
description: The insect, which has been found in America for the first time since 1966, is a growing concern in the southern US.
content:
US agriculture and health officials have outlined a plan to combat a flesh-eating parasite that has been detected in the US for the first time since 1966.

title: How Trump’s White House ballroom plan has doubled in size and cost
description: BBC Verify examines how the biggest change to the White House in decades has transformed in the last year.
content: In the year since US President Donald Trump announced plans to build a new ballroom at the White House, the proposals have grown to include a rooftop "drone port", an underground hospital and "top secret" military facilities - and the estimated price... [5805 chars]

title: One in four births in England are now emergency caesareans, BBC analysis shows
description: The shift marks a significant rise over the last five years, but experts say there is no single, clear explanation for the increase.
content:
A quarter of all babies in England are now delivered by emergency caesarean operations, BBC analysis shows - marking a significant rise over the last five years.
The unplanned surgeries have increased by eight percentage points, while the rate of ele... [6224 chars]

title: 'World-first' vaccine designed by Artificial Intelligence
description: Cambridge scientists say they have, for the first time, tested a vaccine designed by AI.
content:
Artificial intelligence has been used to develop a "fundamentally new" type of vaccine that could protect against large swathes of viruses and prevent pandemics, say researchers.
